  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Wellsworth Energy Services Limited (WESL) is a leading provider of energy services to exploration and production companies in Nigeria. By focusing on innovative technology, world-class safety practices, and personnel competence, WESL offers its clients high-quality support for their operations that translates to increased efficiency and lower operating costs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Manage Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable processes
	Process and reconcile vendor and customer invoices
	Monitor invoice submissions and payment follow-ups
	Perform bank, supplier, and intercompany reconciliations
	Maintain accurate financial records and schedules
	Support treasury and cash flow monitoring activities
	Ensure compliance with financial policies and internal controls
	Prepare financial reports, reconciliations, and aged analysis
	Liaise with customers, vendors, and internal stakeholders on finance-related matters
	Support audit processes and financial reporting activities.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related discipline with 5&ndash;7 years of relevant accounting/finance experience
	ICAN qualification is compulsory
	Strong knowledge of Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, reconciliations, and financial controls
	Proficiency in ERP/accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Strong analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills
	Prior experience in the oil &amp; gas servicing industry will be an added advantage


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@wellsworthenergy.com using the Job Position and State as the subject of the email.",

Account Officer Job at Wellsworth Energy Services Limited




        
    

        
        Wellsworth Energy Services Limited (WESL) is a leading provider of energy services to exploration and production companies in Nigeria. By focusing on innovative technology, world-class safety practices, and personnel competence, WESL offers its clients high-quality support for their operations that translates to increased efficiency and lower operating costs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable processes
	Process and reconcile vendor and customer invoices
	Monitor invoice submissions and payment follow-ups
	Perform bank, supplier, and intercompany reconciliations
	Maintain accurate financial records and schedules
	Support treasury and cash flow monitoring activities
	Ensure compliance with financial policies and internal controls
	Prepare financial reports, reconciliations, and aged analysis
	Liaise with customers, vendors, and internal stakeholders on finance-related matters
	Support audit processes and financial reporting activities.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related discipline with 5–7 years of relevant accounting/finance experience
	ICAN qualification is compulsory
	Strong knowledge of Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, reconciliations, and financial controls
	Proficiency in ERP/accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Strong analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills
	Prior experience in the oil & gas servicing industry will be an added advantage


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and State as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "title": "Manager",
  "description": "De Hallet Lounge &amp; Bar, a Nightclub, Restaurant, Bar, Lounge with luxury nightlife experience, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Manager

Job Location: Ovara-Orogun, Ughelli North, Delta

Job Summary


	Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a growing and reputable hospitality brand?
	We are looking for talented, dedicated, and a results-driven Manager to join our expanding team.


What We Offer


	Accommodation Available.
	Professional and supportive work environment.
	Career growth and development opportunities.
	Accommodation support for eligible candidates.
	Opportunity to be part of a fast-growing hospitality brand.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: de.hallet@yahoo.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	For more enquiries, whatsApp: +234 705 037 2746.
	Candidates from any state in Nigeria are welcome to apply.
	However, applicants outside Delta State must be willing to relocate for on-site positions.
	Accommodation is available.
	If you are passionate about excellence, hospitality, leadership, teamwork, and delivering exceptional customer experiences, we would love to hear from you.
	Only qualified candidates will be contacted.

Manager Job at De Hallet Lounge & Bar




        
    

        
        De Hallet Lounge & Bar, a Nightclub, Restaurant, Bar, Lounge with luxury nightlife experience, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Manager

Job Location: Ovara-Orogun, Ughelli North, Delta

Job Summary


	Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a growing and reputable hospitality brand?
	We are looking for talented, dedicated, and a results-driven Manager to join our expanding team.


What We Offer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Accommodation Available.
	Professional and supportive work environment.
	Career growth and development opportunities.
	Accommodation support for eligible candidates.
	Opportunity to be part of a fast-growing hospitality brand.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	For more enquiries, whatsApp: +234 705 037 2746.
	Candidates from any state in Nigeria are welcome to apply.
	However, applicants outside Delta State must be willing to relocate for on-site positions.
	Accommodation is available.
	If you are passionate about excellence, hospitality, leadership, teamwork, and delivering exceptional customer experiences, we would love to hear from you.
	Only qualified candidates will be contacted.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "MarketWakaa is a convenience-driven market sourcing and delivery service helping people in Ibadan buy fresh foodstuff from Bodija Market without physically going to the market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;
Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary


	MarketWakaa is looking for a creative and reliable Social Media Manager to help grow our online presence.


What You&rsquo;ll Do


	Manage our social media pages.
	Create and schedule content.
	Run Meta Ads (Facebook &amp; Instagram).
	Engage with our audience.
	Help grow the brand online.


Salary
N40,000 &ndash; N70,000 / month.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",
  "employmentType": "Contract",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "MarketWakaa"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",

Social Media Manager Job at MarketWakaa




        
    

        
        MarketWakaa is a convenience-driven market sourcing and delivery service helping people in Ibadan buy fresh foodstuff from Bodija Market without physically going to the market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
      
Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary


	MarketWakaa is looking for a creative and reliable Social Media Manager to help grow our online presence.


What You’ll Do
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage our social media pages.
	Create and schedule content.
	Run Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram).
	Engage with our audience.
	Help grow the brand online.


Salary
N40,000 – N70,000 / month.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant To The CEO",
  "description": "mDoc is digital health start up that leverages behavioral science, data, technology and quality improvement methodologies to improve access to quality healthcare for people with chronic health needs in sub-Saharan Africa. We are seeking an all-star product suite lead to join our team. Our ethos is etched in the belief that augmenting the healthcare &amp; technology landscape is paramount to helping Africa unlock its true potential. We are on a mission to transform how African healthcare consumers receive the support they need to live longer, healthier, happier and more productive lives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant To The CEO&nbsp;

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a world-class Executive Assistant to the Founders, similar in caliber to an EA at top-tier firms such as McKinsey, Bain, BCG, or leading technology companies.
	This individual will provide strategic, operational, and administrative support to the founders of a fast-growing digital health and AI-enabled organization operating across multiple geographies.
	This is not a traditional administrative role: it requires exceptional judgment, ownership, attention to detail, confidentiality, and the ability to manage complex priorities in a fast-moving environment.
	The right candidate anticipates needs before they arise, thrives under pressure, communicates crisply, and ensures the Founders&rsquo; time, focus, and execution are aligned with organizational priorities.


Key Responsibilities
Executive Support &amp; Time Leadership:


	Manage complex calendars across multiple time zones; proactively resolve conflicts.
	Ensure the founders are fully briefed and prepared for meetings, including pre-read documents, talking points, and follow-up actions.
	Drive time prioritization based on strategic priorities, and protect focus time.
	Manage sensitive communications and maintain strict confidentiality.


Communications &amp; Coordination:


	Draft high-quality emails, memos, and presentations on behalf of the founders.
	Serve as the primary liaison between the founders and internal/external stakeholders, ensuring timely, professional, and accurate communication.
	Follow up on open items and action points with teams to ensure timely execution.


Operational Excellence:


	Build and manage systems that improve the efficiency of the founders&rsquo; workflows (e.g., trackers, dashboards, document management, meeting notes).
	Coordinate travel logistics end-to-end across multiple countries.
	Maintain organized records, files, and documentation across platforms.
	Support special projects where precision and speed matter.


Strategic Support:


	Conduct background research, synthesize information, and prepare briefing notes.
	Support preparation for board meetings, donor meetings, investor conversations, and key presentations.
	Help drive follow-ups on strategic initiatives, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.


Culture, Professionalism, and Representation:


	Represent the founders with extreme professionalism, maturity, and discretion.
	Maintain a calm, solutions-oriented demeanor at all times.
	Model high performance, reliability, and impeccable work ethic.


&nbsp;

Qualifications Essential


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree required; Master&rsquo;s degree is a plus.
	5&ndash;8+ years of supporting C-suite executives or senior partners in demanding organizations (top-tier consulting, high-growth startups, investment firms, etc.).
	Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills.
	Mastery of productivity tools (Google Workspace, Slack, Zoom, project management tools, document versioning systems).
	Highly organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities independently.
	Excellent judgment, discretion, and emotional intelligence.
	Evidence of producing high-quality work under tight deadlines.


Preferred:


	Experience working with globally distributed teams.
	Background in digital health, technology, consulting, or social impact organizations.
	Ability to analyze information, synthesize it clearly, and support decision-making.
	Strong research skills and ability to produce crisp briefs.


Success Metrics:


	Founders consistently feel informed, prepared, and supported.
	Zero missed deadlines, dropped balls, or errors in communication.
	Increased productivity and strategic focus of the founders.
	Improved coordination, meeting quality, and follow-through across the organization.
	Professional, timely representation of the founders with internal and external stakeholders.


Method of Application
Interesteda and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover letter to: mdoc_recruiting@mymdoc.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-03",

  },

Executive Assistant To The CEO Job at mDoc Healthcare




        
    

        
        mDoc is digital health start up that leverages behavioral science, data, technology and quality improvement methodologies to improve access to quality healthcare for people with chronic health needs in sub-Saharan Africa. We are seeking an all-star product suite lead to join our team. Our ethos is etched in the belief that augmenting the healthcare & technology landscape is paramount to helping Africa unlock its true potential. We are on a mission to transform how African healthcare consumers receive the support they need to live longer, healthier, happier and more productive lives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant To The CEO 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a world-class Executive Assistant to the Founders, similar in caliber to an EA at top-tier firms such as McKinsey, Bain, BCG, or leading technology companies.
	This individual will provide strategic, operational, and administrative support to the founders of a fast-growing digital health and AI-enabled organization operating across multiple geographies.
	This is not a traditional administrative role: it requires exceptional judgment, ownership, attention to detail, confidentiality, and the ability to manage complex priorities in a fast-moving environment.
	The right candidate anticipates needs before they arise, thrives under pressure, communicates crisply, and ensures the Founders’ time, focus, and execution are aligned with organizational priorities.


Key Responsibilities
Executive Support & Time Leadership:


	Manage complex calendars across multiple time zones; proactively resolve conflicts.
	Ensure the founders are fully briefed and prepared for meetings, including pre-read documents, talking points, and follow-up actions.
	Drive time prioritization based on strategic priorities, and protect focus time.
	Manage sensitive communications and maintain strict confidentiality.


Communications & Coordination:


	Draft high-quality emails, memos, and presentations on behalf of the founders.
	Serve as the primary liaison between the founders and internal/external stakeholders, ensuring timely, professional, and accurate communication.
	Follow up on open items and action points with teams to ensure timely execution.


Operational Excellence:


	Build and manage systems that improve the efficiency of the founders’ workflows (e.g., trackers, dashboards, document management, meeting notes).
	Coordinate travel logistics end-to-end across multiple countries.
	Maintain organized records, files, and documentation across platforms.
	Support special projects where precision and speed matter.


Strategic Support:


	Conduct background research, synthesize information, and prepare briefing notes.
	Support preparation for board meetings, donor meetings, investor conversations, and key presentations.
	Help drive follow-ups on strategic initiatives, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.


Culture, Professionalism, and Representation:


	Represent the founders with extreme professionalism, maturity, and discretion.
	Maintain a calm, solutions-oriented demeanor at all times.
	Model high performance, reliability, and impeccable work ethic.


 

Qualifications Essential


	Bachelor’s degree required; Master’s degree is a plus.
	5–8+ years of supporting C-suite executives or senior partners in demanding organizations (top-tier consulting, high-growth startups, investment firms, etc.).
	Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills.
	Mastery of productivity tools (Google Workspace, Slack, Zoom, project management tools, document versioning systems).
	Highly organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities independently.
	Excellent judgment, discretion, and emotional intelligence.
	Evidence of producing high-quality work under tight deadlines.


Preferred:


	Experience working with globally distributed teams.
	Background in digital health, technology, consulting, or social impact organizations.
	Ability to analyze information, synthesize it clearly, and support decision-making.
	Strong research skills and ability to produce crisp briefs.


Success Metrics:


	Founders consistently feel informed, prepared, and supported.
	Zero missed deadlines, dropped balls, or errors in communication.
	Increased productivity and strategic focus of the founders.
	Improved coordination, meeting quality, and follow-through across the organization.
	Professional, timely representation of the founders with internal and external stakeholders.


Method of Application
Interesteda and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
